findings.title: Path A is still the intended active direction, but not current live truth
findings.detail: The plan still points toward reserve-first stage-20 same-day validation as direction, but current live admissibility is blocked.

findings.title: Path B lacks formal supersedure basis
findings.detail: Historical step-16 adjacency and later drift notes are insufficient to claim formal supersedure of the active line.

findings.title: Path C has strongest machine-backed support
findings.detail: Current owner-surface truth remains blocked by claim-gate, participation, reserve posture, and contradiction evidence.

claim_escalation_risks.detail: Treating Path A as currently open would overstate readiness against explicit blocked live evidence.
Treating Path B as superseded without a formal packet would fabricate governance.
Green healthcheck alone is insufficient because status and rotation owner surfaces still block claims.

doc_packet_recommendation.detail: A narrow reconciliation packet is required only if the project wants to escalate beyond hold. It is optional when Path C is kept unchanged.
